title: MedAdvisor Encounter Rubric
description: One rubric per location. Organized by the 5 universal encounter phases (opening, eliciting concerns, empathy, plan, closing). Encodes a medical educator's mark scheme as behavioral, transcript-detectable, evidence-bearing criteria. The rubric is the source of truth — the model applies it, it does not invent criteria. Only include criteria judgeable from a spoken transcript.

location.description: Clinical setting this rubric applies to.

version.description: Semver; bump on any criterion change so a score ties to an exact rubric version.

derivedFrom.description: Which director materials this was distilled from.

signedOff.description: True once the director confirms 'yes, this is my framework'.

dimensions.description: The 5 encounter phases. Each criterion belongs to one.

coaching.description: Goal-setting content for this phase (used by goal-setting mode).

prompt.description: Behavioral yes/no question, judgeable from the transcript.

requiredElements.description: Specific things that must be addressed (director-specified, so the model checks presence rather than recalling medicine).

criticalFail.description: If true, failing this is flagged separately and is not averaged away (e.g. safety-netting).

method.description: per_dimension_met = show X-of-Y met per phase + coarse band (NOT a single 0-100). Director's forms are formative, not graded.

bands.description: Coarse proficiency bands instead of a precise percentage.
